Title: Ratty — A GPU-rendered terminal emulator with inline 3D graphics 🐀🧀
Description: Ratty is a GPU-rendered terminal emulator with a spinning rat cursor, multiple 3D presentation modes and support for inline 3D graphics. Inspired by TempleOS and built with Rust and Ratatui.

Title: Mythos 'Discovered' a CVE Already in Its Training Data - and That’s Still Worrying
Description: Anthropic made headlines claiming Claude Mythos achieved the “first remote kernel exploit discovered and exploited by an AI.” We went looking for how - and found a 20-year-old bug hiding in plain sight.

Title: Obsidian Plugin Abused in Social Engineering Campaign to Deliver New PHANTOMPULSE RAT
Description: A sophisticated campaign is abusing the Obsidian note-taking app to deliver a new RAT, PHANTOMPULSE, to targets in the finance and crypto sectors using social engineering and malicious plugins.

Title: Mythos finds a curl vulnerability
Description: yes, as in singular one. Back in April 2026 Anthropic caused a lot of media noise when they concluded that their new AI model Mythos is dangerously good at finding security flaws in source code. Apparently Mythos was so good at this that Anthropic would not release this model to the public yet but instead … Continue reading Mythos finds a curl vulnerability →

Title: We Are Not Going to Agree on AI

Title: Maryland citizens slapped with $2 billion power grid upgrade bill for out-of-state AI data centers — state complains to federal energy regulators, says additional cost breaks ‘ratepayer protection pledge’ promises
Description: Aren't AI hyperscalers supposed to pay for these upgrades?

Title: Im going back to writing code by hand
Description: I vibe-coded a GPU-aware Kubernetes TUI for 7 months, archived it, and started over. Here's what AI gets wrong when projects grow complex.

Title: Running local models on an M4 with 24GB memory | jola.dev
Description: Experiments with getting usable outputs out of local models on a standard Macbook
